message:
🌱 Add thanos: query: with grafana gives inconsistent dashboard with every mission (#782)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "thanos-5501-query-with-grafana-gives-inconsistent-dashboard-with-every-refresh",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "thanos: query: with grafana gives inconsistent dashboard with every refresh",
+    "description": "query: with grafana gives inconsistent dashboard with every refresh. This issue affects 8+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify thanos troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your thanos deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos -n thanos --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review thanos configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant thanos configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos
kubectl get configmap -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=thanos
```
**Thanos, Prometheus and Golang version used**:
* Thanos: 11.1.0, deployed through [Bitnami helm chart](https://github.com/bitnami/charts/tree/master/bitnami/thanos), quay.io/thanos/thanos:v0.25.2
* Prometheus: 0.57.0 deployed through"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for query: with grafana gives inconsistent dashboard with every…",
+        "description": "Fix a data race between Respond() and query/queryRange functions by
returning an extra optional function from instrumented functions that
releases the resources i.e. calls Close().

Cannot reproduce the following race:

```
==================
WARNING: DATA RACE
Write at 0x00c00566fa00 by goroutine
```yaml
thanos:
  storegateway:
    enabled: false
  query:
    enabled: true
    replicaLabel:
      - prometheus_replica
    dnsDiscovery:
      sidecarsService: 'prometheus-stack-kube-prom-thanos-discovery'
      sidecarsNamespace: 'prometheus'

kube-prometheus-stack:
  grafana:
    sidecar:
      datasources:
        url: http://prometheus-stack-thanos-query:9090/
        initDatasources: true
      dashboards:
        searchNamespace: ALL
        labelValue: null # Needs to be null in order to load our dashboards
  prometheus:
    replicas: 3
    thanosService:
      enabled: true
    thanosServi
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm query: with grafana gives inconsistent dashboard… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos -n thanos --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n thanos --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Fix a data race between Respond() and query/queryRange functions by
returning an extra optional function from instrumented functions that
releases the resources i.e. calls Close().",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "thanos:
  storegateway:
    enabled: false
  query:
    enabled: true
    replicaLabel:
      - prometheus_replica
    dnsDiscovery:
      sidecarsService: 'prometheus-stack-kube-prom-thanos-discovery'
      sidecarsNamespace: 'prometheus'

kube-prometheus-stack:
  grafana:
    sidecar:
      datasources:
        url: http://prometheus-stack-thanos-query:9090/
        initDatasources: true
      dashboards:
        searchNamespace: ALL
        labelValue: null # Needs to be null in order to load our dashboards
  prometheus:
    replicas: 3
    thanosService:
      enabled: true
    thanosServiceMonitor:
      enabled: true
    service:
      sessionAffinity: 'ClientIP'
    prometheusSpec:
      thanos:
        objectStorageConfig:
          key: config-file.yaml
          name: thanos-secr",
+        "- name: kube-prometheus-stack
    version: 36.6.2
    repository: https://prometheus-community.github.io/helm-charts
  - name: thanos
    version: 10.5.5
    repository: https://charts.bitnami.com/bitnami"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "thanos",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "thanos"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Service",
+      "Secret"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/5501",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/5583"
+    },
+    "reactions": 8,
+    "comments": 23,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "thanos"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with Thanos deployed (sidecar, query, store gateway, compactor as needed). The thanos binary provides subcommands for each component."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:27:21.034Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
